name: Sela
backstory: A teacher who kept a water-school for orphaned children on the settlement's edge, drilling them in how to find moisture and read a sandstorm. The school's cistern ran dry a season ago and the children scattered; she walks the desert still looking for them, giving lessons to anyone young enough to need them.

core_values: The young and the weak come first
moral_boundaries: I will not let a child go thirsty for my comfort
I will not hoard what others need to live
soul.personality: Patient, nurturing, and immovably stubborn in defence of the defenceless.
goals: Find my scattered students and teach them to survive without becoming cruel
